---
title: "Figure 1a"
author: "JuHyeongYu"
date: "2026-03-05"
output: html_document
---

Figure 1a

```{r}
# Load necessary libraries

library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggpubr)

# Load the data from Supplementary Data 1

suppl1_a <- read_excel('/Users/zzuhyeong2/Documents/JoonAhn_Lab/Project1/41467_2024_54434_MOESM5_ESM.xlsx', sheet = 1)

# Verify the basic cohort numbers

table(suppl1_a$DX)
table(suppl1_a$AJCC.8th.TNMstage)
table(suppl1_a$Pathologic.N)
table(suppl1_a$Adjuvant.Treatment)
table(suppl1_a$Adjuvant.Treatment, suppl1_a$Recur.status, useNA = "always")

```

```{r}
# First Figure of Figure 1a

# 1. Data Preprocessing
# Convert DX and Recurrence_status to factors with specific levels for correct ordering
# Reference paper order: AD, SC, MA, NC, Others 

suppl1_a$DX <- factor(suppl1_a$DX, levels = c("AD", "SC", "MA", "NC", "Others"))

# 2. Plotting

fig1a_1 <- ggplot(suppl1_a, aes(x = DX, fill = DX)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "count", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3, width = 0.9, alpha = 0.7) +
  theme_pubr() +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  labs(title = NULL, x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  stat_count(geom = "text", aes(label = ..count..), vjust = -0.5, size = 7)

fig1a_1
```

```{r}
# 1. Data Preprocessing
suppl1_a$AJCC.8th.TNMstage <- factor(suppl1_a$AJCC.8th.TNMstage, 
                                    levels = c("IA1", "IA2", "IA3", "IB", 
                                               "IIA", "IIB", "IIIA", "IIIB", "IVA"))

# 2. Plotting
fig1a_2 <- ggplot(suppl1_a, aes(x = AJCC.8th.TNMstage, fill = AJCC.8th.TNMstage)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "count", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3, width = 0.9) + 
  # direction = -1 reverses the color scale (from yellow to dark purple)
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "viridis", direction = -1) +  
  theme_pubr() +
  # Remove axis titles for a cleaner, publication-ready look
  labs(title = NULL, x = NULL, y = NULL) + 
  theme(legend.position = "none") + 
  geom_text(stat = "count", aes(label = after_stat(count)), 
            vjust = -0.5, size = 5, color = "black") 

fig1a_2
```
```{r}
# 1. Data Preprocessing 
suppl1_a$Pathologic.N <- factor(suppl1_a$Pathologic.N, levels = c("N0", "N1", "N2"))

# 2. Custom Colors: Matching the original paper's palette for Panel 3
fig1a_3_col <- c("N0" = "#E2E2E2", "N1" = "#9A9A71", "N2" = "#B06A73")

# 3. Plotting
fig1a_3 <- ggplot(suppl1_a, aes(x = Pathologic.N, fill = Pathologic.N)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "count", color = "black", linewidth = 0.4, width = 0.9) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = fig1a_3_col) +  
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = NULL, x = NULL, y = NULL) + 
  theme(
    legend.position = "none") +
  geom_text(stat = "count", aes(label = after_stat(count)), 
            vjust = -0.5, size = 7, color = "black")


fig1a_3
```
```{r}

# 1. Data Preprocessing 
suppl1_a <- suppl1_a %>% 
  # Filter out rows where Recur.status is NA
  filter(!is.na(Recur.status)) %>% 
  # String replacement: Change "&" to "+"
  mutate(Adjuvant.Treatment = gsub("CTx & RTx", "CTx+RTx", Adjuvant.Treatment, fixed = TRUE), 
    Adjuvant.Treatment = factor(Adjuvant.Treatment, 
                                 levels = c("CTx+RTx", "RTx", "CTx", "None")),
    # Recode Recur.status: 1 to "Recur", 0 to "None"
    Recur.status = factor(Recur.status, 
                          levels = c(0, 1), 
                          labels = c("None", "Recur"))
  )

# 2. Custom Colors                            
                               
recur_colors <- c("Recur" = "#E17070", "None" = "#C0C0C0")

# 3. Plotting 

fig1a_4 <- ggplot(suppl1_a, aes(x = Adjuvant.Treatment, fill = Recur.status)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "count", color = "black", linewidth = 0.4, width = 0.9) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = recur_colors) +
  theme_pubr() +
  labs(title = NULL, x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.position = c(0.2, 0.9), 
        legend.direction = "vertical") +
  geom_text(stat = "count", aes(label = after_stat(count)), 
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), 
            size = 8, color = "black")

fig1a_4

```
```{r}
# 1. Load Patchwork Library

library(patchwork)

# 2. Combine all 4 panels horizontally

fig1a <- (fig1a_1 | fig1a_2 | fig1a_3 | fig1a_4) + 
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1, 1, 1.2)) & 
  theme(
    plot.margin = margin(25, 5, 10, 5), 
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)
  )

ggsave("Figure_1a.png", 
       plot = fig1a, 
       width = 14, 
       height = 8, 
       units = "in", 
       dpi = 300)

fig1a
```
